approval.scope: Phase 02 user level amount thresholds and default country-tier mapping
rules_summary: Incomplete profile always returns D for probing.
T1 users with lifetime_spend_usd >= 200 return S unless manually overridden earlier.
Any user with lifetime_spend_usd >= 99 or vip_level >= 1 returns A.
Complete-profile T1 users below A threshold default to B.
T2, T3, and unknown countries default to C.
approval.notes: Amounts are gross lifetime spend in USD. Changes require a new signed config revision.

final_confirmation.confirmation_text: H-01, H-02, H-05, H-07, H-08, H-09, H-10, H-11 all confirmed approved.
